exam_name: CIPM Level I (Certificate in Investment Performance Measurement)
question_types: Constructed Response (Essay) — Level III AM session
exam_price_notes: One-time CIPM Program enrollment fee $250 plus per-exam fee $625.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Prometric authorized test centers globally

id_requirements: One valid, unexpired, original government-issued photo ID (passport strongly recommended internationally). ID must match the name on the CFA Institute registration exactly. Photocopies not accepted.
exam_rules: Closed-book. Only approved CFA Institute calculators permitted: Texas Instruments BA II Plus (including Professional) or HP 12C (including Platinum). No personal calculators, phones, or electronic devices. Scratch paper provided and collected. Two sessions per day with optional break.
renewal_options: CFA Charter is permanent. No renewal or continuing education required.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates may register for the next available exam window after a failed attempt. CFA exams offered 2–4 times per year depending on level. No limit on total attempts.

official_study_resources.title: CFA Program Curriculum
official_study_resources.notes: Included in exam registration. Covers all topic areas and learning outcome statements.

official_study_resources.title: CFA Official Mock Exams
official_study_resources.notes: Free mock exams included with registration; additional mocks available

aliases: cipm certificate in investment performance measurement
cipm level i certificate in investment performance measurement
